name: Kat & Alfie: Redwater
overview: Kathleen and Alfie Moon arrive in the sleepy Irish village of Redwater on a quest to find Kathleen's long-lost son Luke, who was given up for adoption to an Irish family 32 years ago. EastEnders spin-off series.

trailers.title: Kat and Alfie: Redwater | Trailer - BBC One
